text.title: Use Case Modeling — Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to produce the artefact end-to-end.

step.name: identify-actor-goal
step.action: Pick actor + goal pair for the slice.

step.name: main-path-draft
step.action: Author numbered main success scenario with actor + system response per step.

step.name: alternates
step.action: Identify decision branches and document alternate flows.

step.name: exceptions
step.action: Identify likely exceptions per step; document exception flows.

step.name: review-with-actor
step.action: Walkthrough with the actor (or their proxy); capture corrections.
